---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

# install karyotype to visualize cytobands 

## 1q gain 
```{r}
# if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
# BiocManager::install("karyoploteR")

library(karyoploteR)

library(GenomicRanges)


# Get cytoband info for hg38
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Filter for chr1 q arm only
chr1q_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames(cytobands) == "chr1" & grepl("^q", cytobands$name))

# Create karyoplot for chr1
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome="hg38", chromosomes="chr1", plot.type=1)

# Add custom labels for only q-arm bands
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1q_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1q_bands) + end(chr1q_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(0.5, length(chr1q_bands)),
  labels = chr1q_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 3,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)

# Save as PDF
pdf("chr1_karyotype_labels.pdf", width=10, height=3)
plotKaryotype(genome="hg38", chromosomes="chr1")
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Load cytobands and filter chr1
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")
chr1_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr1")

# Set your custom file path
output_path <- "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/bulk seq/chr1_cytobands_labeled.pdf"

# Save plot as PDF
pdf(output_path, width = 10, height = 3)

# Plot chr1
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr1")

# Convert seqnames to a character vector of the correct length
label_regions <- GRanges(
  seqnames = rep("chr1", length(chr1_bands)),  # FIX HERE
  ranges = IRanges(start = start(chr1_bands), end = end(chr1_bands))
)

# Add labels
kpText(kp,
       data = label_regions,
       labels = chr1_bands$name,
       y = 0.3,
       srt = 90,
       cex = 0.5,
       pos = 3)

dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Get cytobands (hg38)
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Filter for chr1 q-arm only
chr1q_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr1" & grepl("^q", name))

# Define zoom range for q-arm
chr1q_start <- min(start(chr1q_bands))
chr1q_end <- max(end(chr1q_bands))

# Plot zoomed-in chr1 q-arm only
kp <- plotKaryotype(
  genome = "hg38",
  chromosomes = "chr1",
  zoom = GRanges("chr1", IRanges(start = chr1q_start, end = chr1q_end))
)

# Add q-arm cytobands
kpAddCytobands(kp, cytobands = chr1q_bands)

# Add labels ABOVE the cytobands
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1q_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1q_bands) + end(chr1q_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(1.2, length(chr1q_bands)),  # place above ideogram
  labels = chr1q_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 1,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
```

```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Load cytobands
cytobands <- getCytobands()

# Filter to chr1 q-arm only
chr1q_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr1" & grepl("^q", name))

# Get start and end coordinates of q-arm
chr1q_start <- min(start(chr1q_bands))
chr1q_end   <- max(end(chr1q_bands))

# Create plot with only chr1 and zoom into q-arm range
pdf("chr1q_karyotype.pdf", width=10, height=3)

kp <- plotKaryotype(
  chromosomes = "chr1",
  zoom = GRanges("chr1", IRanges(start = chr1q_start, end = chr1q_end))
)

# Add cytobands only from q-arm
kpAddCytobands(kp, cytobands = chr1q_bands)


# Create karyoplot for chr1
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome="hg38", chromosomes="chr1", plot.type=1)

# Save as PDF
dev.off()
```

```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Get cytoband data
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Subset for chr1 q-arm only
chr1q_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr1" & grepl("^q", name))

# Get zoom range for q-arm
chr1q_start <- min(start(chr1q_bands))
chr1q_end <- max(end(chr1q_bands))

# Create zoomed-in plot of chr1 q-arm
kp <- plotKaryotype(
  genome = "hg38",
  chromosomes = "chr1",
  zoom = GRanges("chr1", IRanges(start = chr1q_start, end = chr1q_end))
)

# Draw cytoband rectangles manually (instead of kpAddCytobands)
kpPlotCytobands(kp, cytobands = chr1q_bands)

# Add cytoband names *above* the ideogram
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1q_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1q_bands) + end(chr1q_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(1.5, length(chr1q_bands)),  # higher Y position
  labels = chr1q_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 1,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
```


## 9p loss
```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Load cytobands and filter chr1
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")
chr9_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr9")

# Set your custom file path
output_path <- "/Users/annabelshinichen/Desktop/SchoolWork/MSBMI/Davoli_lab/bulk seq/chr9_cytobands_labeled.pdf"

# Save plot as PDF
pdf(output_path, width = 10, height = 3)

# Plot chr1
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr9")

# Convert seqnames to a character vector of the correct length
label_regions <- GRanges(
  seqnames = rep("chr9", length(chr9_bands)),  # FIX HERE
  ranges = IRanges(start = start(chr9_bands), end = end(chr9_bands))
)

# Add labels
kpText(kp,
       data = label_regions,
       labels = chr9_bands$name,
       y = 0.3,
       srt = 90,
       cex = 0.5,
       pos = 3)

dev.off()
```


```{r}
getwd()
```

```{r}
regression_results <- readRDS("Regression_Outputs_xcell0.3_cytobandcnv_continuous0.2.rds")
class(regression_results)

data_table<-readRDS("TCGA_working_tables.rds")
class(data_table)
```


## 1p loss
```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Load cytoband data
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Subset chr1p
chr1p_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr1" & grepl("^p", name))
chr1p_start <- min(start(chr1p_bands))
chr1p_end <- max(end(chr1p_bands))

# Plot preview to RStudio
kp1p <- plotKaryotype(
  genome = "hg38",
  chromosomes = "chr1",
  zoom = GRanges("chr1", IRanges(start = chr1p_start, end = chr1p_end))
)

kpAddCytobands(kp1p, cytobands = chr1p_bands)

kpText(
  kp1p,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1p_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1p_bands) + end(chr1p_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(1.5, length(chr1p_bands)),
  labels = chr1p_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 1,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
```

```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Get cytoband info for hg38
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Filter for chr1 p-arm only
chr1p_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames(cytobands) == "chr1" & grepl("^p", cytobands$name))

# Create karyoplot with plot.type=1 to allow label space
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr1", plot.type = 1)

# Add cytoband labels for p-arm
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1p_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1p_bands) + end(chr1p_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(0.5, length(chr1p_bands)),  # lower side of ideogram
  labels = chr1p_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 3,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
```

```{r}
# save as pdf
pdf("chr1p_karyotype_labels.pdf", width = 10, height = 3)
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr1", plot.type = 1)
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr1p_bands)),
  x = (start(chr1p_bands) + end(chr1p_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(0.5, length(chr1p_bands)),
  labels = chr1p_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 3,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
dev.off()
```

## 6p gain 
```{r}
library(karyoploteR)
library(GenomicRanges)

# Load cytoband data for hg38
cytobands <- getCytobands("hg38")

# Filter for chromosome 6 p-arm
chr6p_bands <- subset(cytobands, seqnames == "chr6" & grepl("^p", cytobands$name))

# Create karyoplot with padding space for labeling
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr6", plot.type = 1)

# Add custom labels for only 6p cytobands
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr6p_bands)),
  x = (start(chr6p_bands) + end(chr6p_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(0.5, length(chr6p_bands)),  # label below the ideogram
  labels = chr6p_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 3,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
```

```{r}
# save
pdf("chr6p_karyotype_labels.pdf", width = 10, height = 3)
kp <- plotKaryotype(genome = "hg38", chromosomes = "chr6", plot.type = 1)
kpText(
  kp,
  chr = as.character(seqnames(chr6p_bands)),
  x = (start(chr6p_bands) + end(chr6p_bands)) / 2,
  y = rep(0.5, length(chr6p_bands)),
  labels = chr6p_bands$name,
  srt = 90,
  pos = 3,
  cex = 0.6,
  col = "black"
)
dev.off()
```

# Working table
```{r}
# Combine all elements (data frames) in the list into a single data frame
working_table <- bind_rows(data_table)

# Check the result
print(working_table)
```

# Regressgion results
```{r}
library(dplyr)

combined <- bind_rows(regression_results, .id = "TumorType")

# Export to CSV
write.csv(combined, "regression_results_continous.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

check what is inside 
```{r}
names(regression_results)
```
```{r}
# show structure of list up to 2 levels deep
str(regression_results, max.level = 2)
```
